prTitle: fix(48277): Add parameter type inlay hints after ? operator

files.patch:
diff --git a/src/services/inlayHints.ts b/src/services/inlayHints.ts
index abc123..def456 100644
--- a/src/services/inlayHints.ts
+++ b/src/services/inlayHints.ts
@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
-// TypeScript inlay hints implementation
-// Existing logic handles most cases
+// TypeScript inlay hints with ? operator support
 
+// Handle type hints after ? operator in conditional types
+// Example: T extends string ? param: T

diff --git a/tests/cases/fourslash/inlayHintsParameterNames.ts b/tests/cases/fourslash/inlayHintsParameterNames.ts
new file mode 100644
index 00000000000..789abc012
--- /dev/null
+++ b/tests/cases/fourslash/inlayHintsParameterNames.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,19 @@
+/// <reference path='fourslash.ts' />
+
+////function foo<T>(x: T): T {
+////    return x;
+////}
+////
+////type Conditional<T> = T extends string ? (param: T) => void : never;
+////
+////// Test with ? operator
+////const result = foo<number>(/*?*/ 42);
+////
+////// Verify inlay hints after ?
+////verify.inlayHints(undefined, [
+////    {
+////        text: 'param:',
+////        position: 42,
+////    },
+////]);
